name: event_id
description: Unique UUID of the outbox audit event.

name: event_type
description: Type of identity event (e.g. USER_CREATED, DEVICE_REGISTERED).

name: user_id
description: Associated user UUID or OIDC subject claim.

name: pseudonymization_key
description: Cryptographic shredding identifier for GDPR/CCPA right-to-be-forgotten requests.

name: payload
description: Strongly typed native JSON structured event payload.

name: created_at
description: Event creation timestamp for daily partitioning.
